title: Unlit Campfires
description: Campfires now appear unlit in the inventory for consistency with mods that make campfires unlit by default.
body: # 💧 Unlit Campfires 💧 I was always annoyed when using mods like [Campfire Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/campfire-fix) because you still place them with a fire texture but it ends up unlit... very unsettling right? That was enough for me to make this resourcepack. # This resourcepack also makes Soul Campfires have Soul Soil instead of ashes for better consistency. Thank me later. (Soul Campfires was added in 1.16x)
